detail.description: Ali Sánchez grounds out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis.
Ali Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Brooks Lee to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Max Schuemann out at 2nd. Ali Sánchez out at 1st.
Ali Sánchez flies out to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Ali Sánchez reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach McKinstry. Max Schuemann to 3rd. Max Schuemann advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by shortstop Zach McKinstry.
Ali Sánchez flies out to center fielder Blake Dunn.
Ali Sánchez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday. Anthony Volpe to 2nd.
Ali Sánchez pops out softly to second baseman Edwin Arroyo.
Ali Sánchez singles on a line drive to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Anthony Volpe to 3rd.
Ali Sánchez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Colson Montgomery.
Ali Sánchez singles on a line drive to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Anthony Volpe scores.
Ali Sánchez grounds out, shortstop Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras.
Ali Sánchez singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Ali Sánchez out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.
Ali Sánchez singles on a fly ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Ali Sánchez pops out to second baseman Richie Palacios in foul territory.
Ali Sánchez singles on a line drive to right fielder Yohendrick Piñango.
Ali Sánchez doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Nathan Lukes. Anthony Volpe scores.
Ali Sánchez grounds out, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Ali Sánchez lines out to second baseman Anthony Seigler.
Ali Sánchez flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Ali Sánchez grounds out, third baseman Jorbit Vivas to first baseman Curtis Mead.
Ali Sánchez grounds out, shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Curtis Mead.
Ali Sánchez doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Riley Greene. José Caballero scores.
Ali Sánchez lines out to left fielder David Fry.
